title: Pan-Seared Fennel with a Crunchy Dutch Spice Crust
description: A flavorful and crunchy dish that combines the sweetness of fennel with the spices of the Dutch. Perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: Crunchy Seasoning
ingredients.notes: available at most health food stores

instructions: Preheat the skillet to medium-high heat.
Season the sliced fennel with salt and pepper.
Add the olive oil to the skillet and swirl to coat.
Add the fennel to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until slightly browned.
Sprinkle the Dutch Spice Mix over the fennel and toss to coat.
Sprinkle the Crunchy Seasoning over the fennel and toss to coat.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the fennel is tender and the crust is crispy.
